modules.module_title: Vastu Shastra ka Parichay (Introduction to Vastu Shastra)
Dishaen aur Panchamahabhuta (Directions and Five Elements)
Aawasiya Vastu - Mukhya Dwar aur Layout (Residential Vastu - Main Entrance & Layout)
Vastu Dosh Nivaran aur Upay (Vastu Defects Remediation & Solutions)
Vyavaharik Upayog aur Case Studies (Practical Application & Case Studies)

questions.question: Vastu Shastra kya hai?

options.A: Ek ancient Indian science of architecture
options.B: Ek astrological technique

questions.explanation: Vastu Shastra Bharat ka ek prachin vigyan hai jo architecture aur design se sambandhit hai, jiska uddeshya gharon aur anya structures mein positive energy lana hai.

questions.question: Vastu Shastra ka mukhya uddeshya kya hai?

options.B: To bring harmony and prosperity to the residents

questions.explanation: Vastu Shastra ka mukhya uddeshya ghar ke niwasiyon ke liye sukh, shanti, swasthya aur samriddhi lana hai.

questions.question: Vastu Shastra kis cheez par adharit hai?

options.B: Panchamahabhutas aur directions par

questions.explanation: Vastu Shastra mool roop se five basic elements (Panchamahabhutas - Earth, Water, Fire, Air, Space) aur directions (Disha) ke principles par adharit hai.

questions.question: Kise Vastu Purush mana jata hai?

options.B: A mythological deity representing the site
options.D: The main priest of the Vastu puja

questions.explanation: Vastu Purush ek pauranik devta hain jo kisi bhi bhoomi ya structure ke energy field ko represent karte hain, aur Vastu principles inhi ke sharir ke anusaar banaye gaye hain.

questions.question: Vastu Shastra ke according, ghar banane se pehle kya check karna important hai?

options.B: Plot ki Disha aur shape

questions.explanation: Ghar banane se pehle plot ki Disha (direction) aur aakar (shape) ko Vastu ke anusaar check karna bahut zaroori hai, taaki future mein Vastu dosh se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Kya Vastu Shastra sirf naye gharon par apply hota hai?

options.B: Nahi, existing homes par bhi apply hota hai

questions.explanation: Vastu Shastra naye construction ke liye guidelines provide karta hai, lekin existing homes mein bhi Vastu dosh ko identify karke remedies apply kiye ja sakte hain.

questions.question: Vastu mein 'Brahmastan' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Ghar ka exact center part

questions.explanation: Brahmastan ghar ka central part hota hai, jise open aur clutter-free rakhna chahiye kyunki yahan se energy poore ghar mein failti hai.

questions.question: Vastu Shastra mein 'dosh' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Vastu principles ka violation jo negative energy create karta hai
options.C: Ghar ke construction mein technical fault
options.D: Ghar mein guests ka na aana

questions.explanation: Vastu dosh tab hota hai jab ghar ka design ya placement Vastu principles ke against ho, jiske karan negative energy aur problems create ho sakti hain.

questions.question: Vastu Shastra ke hisab se, ek Vastu expert ka primary role kya hai?

options.B: To identify Vastu dosh and suggest remedies for harmony
options.C: To re-design the entire house structure
options.D: To predict the financial future of the residents

questions.explanation: Ek Vastu expert ka mukhya kaam Vastu dosh ko pehchanana aur unhe dur karne ke liye practical aur effective remedies suggest karna hai, bina bade structural changes ke.

questions.question: Vastu Shastra mein 'Chakra' ka kya mahatva hai?

options.A: Yeh ek type ka decorative item hai
options.B: Yeh directions aur energy zones ko represent karta hai
options.C: Yeh sirf mandiron mein use hota hai
options.D: Yeh ghar ke foundation ka hissa hai

questions.explanation: Vastu Chakra directions, sub-directions, aur unse associated energy zones ko represent karta hai, jiske through Vastu dosh ko identify aur analyze kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Vastu ke anusaar, ghar mein natural light aur ventilation ka kya role hai?

options.B: Positive energy aur fresh air ke flow ke liye essential
options.C: Power consumption kam karne ke liye
options.D: Sirf bade gharon ke liye zaroori hai

questions.explanation: Natural light aur ventilation Vastu mein bahut mahatvapurna hain, kyunki yeh positive energy (prana) aur fresh air ke continuous flow ko ensure karte hain, jo swasthya aur samriddhi ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Kya Vastu Shastra ka koi scientific basis hai?

options.A: Nahi, yeh sirf beliefs par adharit hai
options.B: Haan, yeh directions, magnetic fields aur solar energy ke principles par adharit hai
options.C: Sirf ancient texts mein mention hai
options.D: Modern science ise reject karta hai

questions.explanation: Vastu Shastra ke kai principles ka scientific basis hai, jaise directions ke magnetic fields, solar energy ka impact, aur natural elements ka human body aur environment par prabhav. Yeh sirf beliefs nahi, balki practical observations par adharit hai.

questions.question: Ek Vastu consultant ko apne client ko kya advise karna chahiye jab major structural changes possible na ho?

options.B: Non-structural remedies jaise colors, mirrors, plants, etc. suggest karein
options.D: Sirf negative points batakar chod dein

questions.explanation: Jab major structural changes possible na ho, tab ek Vastu consultant ko non-structural remedies jaise colors, mirrors, plants, Vastu yantras, lights, ya energy harmonizers suggest karne chahiye.

questions.question: Vastu Shastra mein 'Urja' (Energy) ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: The vital life force that flows in and around a structure

questions.explanation: Vastu Shastra mein Urja (Energy) ka matlab hai woh vital life force ya cosmic energy jo kisi bhi structure mein aur uske aas-paas flow karti hai, aur Vastu ka aim is energy ko positive rakhna hai.

questions.question: Vastu mein plot ki 'Slope' kis direction mein honi chahiye?

options.B: South-West ki taraf

questions.explanation: Vastu ke anusaar, plot ka slope North-East (Ishaan Kon) ki taraf hona shubh mana jata hai, kyunki yeh positive energy aur water flow ko attract karta hai.

questions.question: Vastu Shastra mein 'Aayadi' calculations kis liye use hote hain?

options.B: Plot ke size aur shape ko determine karne ke liye
options.C: Building dimensions aur measurements ko calculate karne ke liye taaki harmony ensure ho

questions.explanation: Aayadi calculations Vastu Shastra ka ek complex part hain jo building ke dimensions, measurements, aur proportions ko calculate karne mein help karte hain, taaki structure mein positive energy aur harmony bani rahe.

questions.question: Vastu Purush Mandala mein kitne padas hote hain?

options.B: 16 padas

questions.explanation: Standard Vastu Purush Mandala mein 32 padas hote hain, jo alag-alag devtaon aur energy zones ko represent karte hain. Kuch variations mein 64 ya 81 padas bhi hote hain, par 32 standard hai residential Vastu ke liye.

questions.question: Vastu mein total kitni directions consider ki jaati hain?

options.B: 8 directions

questions.explanation: Vastu Shastra mein mukhya roop se 8 directions (North, South, East, West, NE, NW, SE, SW) ke saath-saath Akash (Up) aur Patal (Down) ko bhi consider kiya jata hai, kul 10 directions.

questions.question: East direction kis deity se associated hai?

options.B: Lord Indra

questions.explanation: East direction Lord Indra se associated hai, aur yeh prosperity, success, aur naye avsaron ko represent karti hai. Is direction se surya ki pratham kirne aati hain.

questions.question: North direction kis cheez ke liye shubh mani jaati hai?

options.B: Wealth and career opportunities

questions.explanation: North direction Lord Kuber se associated hai aur yeh wealth, career growth, aur naye avsaron ke liye bahut shubh mani jaati hai.

questions.question: South-West (Nairitya Kon) direction kis element se associated hai?

options.B: Fire

questions.explanation: South-West direction Earth element se associated hai aur stability, relationships, aur skills ke liye mahatvapurna mani jaati hai. Is direction ko ghar mein sabse bhari aur uncha rakhna chahiye.

questions.question: Kitchen ke liye sabse best Vastu direction kaun si hai?

options.B: South-East

questions.explanation: Kitchen ke liye South-East (Agnikon) direction sabse best mani jaati hai kyunki yeh Agni (Fire) element se associated hai, jo cooking ke liye perfect hai.

questions.question: Panchamahabhutas mein se kaun sa element North-East (Ishaan Kon) se juda hai?

options.B: Earth

questions.explanation: North-East (Ishaan Kon) Water element se juda hai aur yeh spirituality, peace, aur mental clarity ke liye bahut shubh mana jata hai. Pooja room ke liye yeh ideal direction hai.

questions.question: Agar ghar ka entrance South-West mein ho toh yeh kya create kar sakta hai?

options.B: Stability and strong relationships

questions.explanation: South-West entrance Vastu dosh mana jata hai aur yeh ghar mein problems, financial instability, aur negative energy la sakta hai. Iske liye strong remedies ki zaroorat hoti hai.

questions.question: Vastu mein 'Akash' (Space) element ka kya mahatva hai?

options.A: Yeh sirf roof ko represent karta hai
options.B: Yeh expansion, communication, aur growth ko signify karta hai
options.C: Yeh underground water level ko represent karta hai
options.D: Yeh building ke foundation ko represent karta hai

questions.explanation: Akash (Space) element expansion, communication, aur growth ko signify karta hai. Ghar mein open aur clutter-free areas, especially Brahmastan, is element ko balance karte hain.

questions.question: Vastu ke anusaar, 'North-West' (Vayavya Kon) direction kis element se associated hai?

options.B: Water

questions.explanation: North-West (Vayavya Kon) Air element se associated hai. Yeh social connections, movement, aur support ko control karta hai. Guests ke room ya storage ke liye suitable hai.

questions.question: Master bedroom ke liye sabse shubh direction kaun si hai?

options.B: South-East

questions.explanation: Master bedroom ke liye South-West (Nairitya Kon) direction sabse shubh mani jaati hai, kyunki yeh stability, authority, aur strong relationships provide karti hai.

questions.question: Toilet aur bathroom ke liye Vastu mein kaun si direction avoid karni chahiye?

options.B: North-West

questions.explanation: Toilet aur bathroom ko North-East (Ishaan Kon) mein banane se sakhti se avoid karna chahiye, kyunki yeh direction Water element aur spirituality se judi hai aur yahan negativity achhi nahi mani jaati.

questions.question: Agar ghar mein Vastu compass use kar rahe hain, toh kis cheez ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Metallic objects se dur rakhna aur true North calculate karna
options.C: Kisi bhi direction ko le sakte hain

questions.explanation: Vastu compass use karte samay, use metallic objects se dur rakhna chahiye jo readings ko affect kar sakte hain. Magnetic North ko identify karke true North (geographical North) ko calculate karna important hai, kyunki Vastu true North par adharit hai.

questions.question: Vastu mein 'Earth' element ka kya mahatva hai?

options.A: Yeh movement aur change ko represent karta hai
options.B: Yeh stability, foundation, aur patience ko signify karta hai
options.C: Yeh communication aur creativity ko represent karta hai
options.D: Yeh emotions aur intuition ko signify karta hai

questions.explanation: Earth element stability, foundation, patience, aur physical strength ko signify karta hai. Iska balance ghar mein security aur groundedness lata hai, especially South-West direction mein.

questions.question: Vastu mein 'Fire' element ka kya mahatva hai?

options.A: Yeh emotions aur healing ko represent karta hai
options.B: Yeh growth aur expansion ko signify karta hai
options.C: Yeh energy, transformation, aur passion ko represent karta hai
options.D: Yeh stability aur support ko signify karta hai

questions.explanation: Fire element energy, transformation, passion, aur naam-roop ko represent karta hai. Kitchen aur electrical appliances ke liye South-East direction is element se judi hai.

questions.question: Vastu ke anusaar, plot ke charon taraf ki boundary walls ki height kaisi honi chahiye?

options.A: Sab taraf ek jaisi honi chahiye
options.B: North aur East mein kam, South aur West mein zyada
options.C: Sirf South mein zyada honi chahiye
options.D: Sirf East mein kam honi chahiye

questions.explanation: Vastu ke anusaar, plot ki boundary walls North aur East mein thodi kam height ki honi chahiye taaki positive energy easily enter kar sake, jabki South aur West mein unchi aur bhari honi chahiye stability aur protection ke liye.

questions.question: Agar kisi plot ka North-East corner cut ho, toh yeh kya dosh create karta hai?

options.B: Health issues, lack of clarity, aur spiritual problems

questions.explanation: North-East corner ka cut hona ek bada Vastu dosh mana jata hai. Yeh health issues, mental clarity mein kami, spiritual growth mein rukawat, aur financial losses create kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Vastu mein 'Water' element ka kya mahatva hai?

options.A: Yeh aggression aur conflict ko represent karta hai
options.B: Yeh emotions, purification, aur wealth ko signify karta hai
options.C: Yeh physical strength aur durability ko represent karta hai
options.D: Yeh rigidity aur stubbornness ko signify karta hai

questions.explanation: Water element emotions, purification, wealth, aur naye avsaron ko signify karta hai. North-East direction is element se judi hai, aur yahan water bodies ka hona shubh mana jata hai.

questions.question: Residential Vastu mein 'Mukhya Dwar' (Main Entrance) ki importance kya hai?

options.A: Sirf ghar ki security ke liye
options.B: Yeh energy ka primary entry point hai aur ghar ki pehchan hai
options.C: Sirf guests ko welcome karne ke liye
options.D: Yeh ghar ke back side ko hide karta hai

questions.explanation: Mukhya Dwar ghar mein energy ka primary entry point hai, aur iski placement, size, aur decoration ghar ke overall Vastu aur niwasiyon ki prosperity par seedha asar dalti hai.

questions.question: Agar ghar ka entrance North direction mein ho, toh yeh Vastu ke hisab se kaisa hai?

options.B: Ashubh

questions.explanation: North-facing entrance Vastu ke anusaar bahut shubh mana jata hai, kyunki yeh wealth, prosperity, aur career growth ko attract karta hai. Yeh Lord Kuber ki direction hai.

questions.question: South-East facing entrance ke liye kya remedy suggest kiya jata hai?

options.B: Red color ka paint karein
options.C: Entrance par Vastu pyramid ya Swastik lagayein

questions.explanation: South-East entrance thoda problematic mana jata hai. Iske dosh ko kam karne ke liye entrance par Vastu pyramid, Swastik, ya Om symbol lagana ek common remedy hai.

questions.question: Plot ki shape Vastu mein kitni important hai?

options.B: Bahut important, square ya rectangular plots best hain
options.C: Sirf triangular plots achhe hote hain

questions.explanation: Plot ki shape Vastu mein bahut important hai. Square ya rectangular plots sabse shubh mane jaate hain, kyunki yeh energy ko evenly distribute karte hain. Irregular shapes Vastu dosh create kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Vastu ke anusaar, ghar ke main gate ke samne kya nahi hona chahiye?

options.B: Dustbin, pole, ya koi bada obstruction

questions.explanation: Ghar ke main gate ke samne koi bhi obstruction jaise dustbin, bada ped, pole, ya broken cheezein nahi honi chahiye, kyunki yeh positive energy ke flow ko block karte hain.

questions.question: Brahmastan ko kaisa rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Toilet ya kitchen banaya jaye

questions.explanation: Brahmastan ko hamesha open, clutter-free, aur well-lit rakhna chahiye taaki positive energy bina rukawat ke poore ghar mein fail sake. Yahan koi heavy construction ya toilet/kitchen avoid karna chahiye.

questions.question: Vastu ke anusaar, ghar mein kitne entrances hone chahiye?

options.B: Do entrances

questions.explanation: Vastu mein even number mein entrances shubh mane jaate hain (jaise 2, 4, 6, 8, 12), except for 10. Odd numbers (except 1) ko avoid karna chahiye. Single entrance bhi chal sakta hai.

questions.question: Brahmastan ko kaisa rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Toilet ya kitchen banaya jaye

questions.explanation: Brahmastan ko hamesha open, clutter-free, aur well-lit rakhna chahiye taaki positive energy bina rukawat ke poore ghar mein fail sake. Yahan koi heavy construction ya toilet/kitchen avoid karna chahiye.

questions.question: Vastu ke anusaar, ghar mein kitne entrances hone chahiye?

options.B: Do entrances

questions.explanation: Vastu mein even number mein entrances shubh mane jaate hain (jaise 2, 4, 6, 8, 12), except for 10. Odd numbers (except 1) ko avoid karna chahiye. Single entrance bhi chal sakta hai.

questions.question: Plot ke North-East corner mein kya hona shubh hai?

options.B: Septic tank
options.C: Water body ya underground water tank

questions.explanation: North-East corner Water element se juda hai. Yahan water body, underground water tank, ya borewell hona bahut shubh mana jata hai, jo wealth aur positive energy ko attract karta hai.

questions.question: Agar plot ka North-West corner extended ho, toh yeh kya effect de sakta hai?

options.B: Social relations mein problems, legal issues

questions.explanation: North-West extension Vastu dosh mana jata hai. Yeh social relations mein problems, legal issues, mental instability, aur health problems create kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Ghar ke main entrance par kaun se colors avoid karne chahiye?

options.B: White aur cream
options.C: Dark aur dull colors jaise black, dark grey

questions.explanation: Main entrance par dark aur dull colors jaise black, dark grey, ya brown (agar bahut zyada ho) avoid karne chahiye, kyunki yeh negativity attract karte hain aur energy ko block karte hain.

questions.question: Vastu ke anusaar, ghar ka main gate wooden hona chahiye ya metal?

options.B: Sirf wood
options.C: Dono chal sakte hain, par wood preferred hai for positive energy

questions.explanation: Vastu mein wooden gates ko prefer kiya jata hai kyunki yeh natural aur warm energy dete hain. Metal gates bhi chal sakte hain, par unhe proper Vastu principles ke according place karna chahiye.

questions.question: Ghar ke main entrance ke samne mirror lagana kaisa hai?

options.B: Avoid karna chahiye kyunki yeh positive energy ko reflect back karta hai
options.D: Sirf decoration ke liye achha hai

questions.explanation: Main entrance ke bilkul samne mirror lagane se avoid karna chahiye, kyunki yeh ghar mein enter hone wali positive energy ko reflect back kar sakta hai. Side walls par lagana theek hai.

questions.question: Vastu mein plot ki 'Vidisha' (diagonal directions) ka kya role hai?

options.B: Yeh primary directions jitni hi important hain for energy flow
options.C: Yeh sirf bade plots ke liye hain
options.D: Yeh sirf decoration ke liye use hoti hain

questions.explanation: Vidisha (North-East, South-East, South-West, North-West) Vastu mein bahut important hain, kyunki yeh bhi energy flow aur specific activities ke liye significant hain. Har Vidisha ka apna ek element aur deity hoti hai.

questions.question: Ghar ka centre (Brahmastan) mein agar pillar ho, toh yeh kya effect dega?

options.B: Positive energy ko enhance karega
options.C: Energy flow ko obstruct karega aur problems create karega

questions.explanation: Brahmastan mein pillar ya koi bhi bada obstruction energy ke free flow ko block karta hai, jisse ghar mein problems aur negativity aa sakti hai.

questions.question: Agar ghar ka entrance West direction mein ho, toh kya yeh shubh hai?

options.B: Generally average, par kuch padas (segments) shubh ho sakte hain

questions.explanation: West-facing entrance generally average mana jata hai. West ke kuch padas (segments) shubh ho sakte hain jo financial gains aur social recognition dete hain, jabki kuch padas negativity la sakte hain.

questions.question: Ghar ke main entrance par 'Toran' lagana kaisa hai?

options.B: Neutral
options.C: Bahut shubh, positive energy attract karta hai

questions.explanation: Main entrance par Toran (bandanwar) lagana bahut shubh mana jata hai. Yeh positive energy aur good luck ko attract karta hai. Fresh flowers ya auspicious symbols wale Toran prefer kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Vastu ke anusaar, ek plot ke North-East aur South-West corners ke beech ka relation kya hai?

options.A: Dono corners ka koi relation nahi hai
options.B: Yeh dono opposite energy poles hain jinhe balance karna zaroori hai
options.C: Dono corners ka weight same hona chahiye
options.D: Dono corners ko open rakhna chahiye

questions.explanation: North-East (Water, light, spiritual) aur South-West (Earth, heavy, materialistic) corners opposite energy poles hain. Inhe balance karna Vastu mein bahut important hai. NE ko light aur open, SW ko heavy aur enclosed rakhna chahiye.

questions.question: Master bedroom kis direction mein hona chahiye?

options.B: South-West

questions.explanation: Master bedroom ke liye South-West (Nairitya Kon) direction sabse shubh mani jaati hai, kyunki yeh stability, authority, aur strong relationships provide karti hai. Isse ghar ke mukhiya ko control milta hai.

questions.question: Kitchen ke liye ideal Vastu direction kaun si hai?

options.B: South-East

questions.explanation: Kitchen ke liye South-East (Agnikon) direction sabse best hai, kyunki yeh Agni (Fire) element se associated hai. Cooking karte samay face East ki taraf hona chahiye.

questions.question: Pooja room kis direction mein hona chahiye?

options.B: West

questions.explanation: Pooja room ke liye North-East (Ishaan Kon) direction sabse shubh hai, kyunki yeh Water element aur spirituality se judi hai. Yahan peace aur positive energy ka flow best hota hai.

questions.question: Toilet aur bathroom kis direction mein avoid karne chahiye?

options.B: South-East

questions.explanation: Toilet aur bathroom ko North-East (Ishaan Kon) aur ghar ke Brahmastan (centre) mein banane se sakhti se avoid karna chahiye, kyunki yeh in shubh areas ki energy ko pollute karte hain.

questions.question: Guest bedroom ke liye kaun si direction suitable hai?

options.B: North-East

questions.explanation: Guest bedroom ke liye North-West (Vayavya Kon) direction suitable hai, kyunki yeh Air element se judi hai aur yahan stay karne wale guests ka movement (aana-jana) bana rehta hai.

questions.question: Students ke study room ke liye kaun si direction best hai?

options.B: North-East ya West

questions.explanation: Students ke study room ke liye North-East (knowledge) ya West (learning) direction achhi mani jaati hai. Padhte samay face East ya North ki taraf hona chahiye.

questions.question: Sleeping direction Vastu mein kya honi chahiye?

options.A: Head South ya East ki taraf
options.B: Head North ki taraf

questions.explanation: Sone ke liye head South ki taraf rakhna sabse shubh mana jata hai, followed by East. North ki taraf head karke sone se avoid karna chahiye kyunki yeh magnetic poles ke alignment ko disturb karta hai.

questions.question: Living room (Drawing room) ke liye kaun si direction best hai?

options.B: North-East ya North

questions.explanation: Living room ke liye North-East ya North direction shubh mani jaati hai, kyunki yeh social interaction aur positive energy ke flow ke liye ideal hain. Yahan se guests ko welcome kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Staircase (seedhiyan) ghar mein kis direction mein honi chahiye?

options.B: South ya West

questions.explanation: Staircase ke liye South ya West direction shubh mani jaati hai, kyunki yeh heavy structures hain aur in directions mein weight hona positive mana jata hai. North-East aur Brahmastan mein avoid karna chahiye.

questions.question: Ghar mein storage area ya store room ke liye kaun si direction suitable hai?

options.B: South-West ya North-West

questions.explanation: Storage area ya store room ke liye South-West (heavy items ke liye) ya North-West (less frequently used items ke liye) directions suitable hain. In areas mein weight hona Vastu ke anusaar theek hai.

questions.question: Agar ghar mein borewell ya underground water tank ho, toh uski ideal location kya hai?

options.B: South-East

questions.explanation: Borewell ya underground water tank ke liye North-East (Ishaan Kon) direction sabse shubh mani jaati hai, kyunki yeh Water element se judi hai aur wealth aur prosperity ko attract karti hai.

questions.question: Kids' bedroom ke liye kaun si direction better hai?

options.B: North-East

questions.explanation: Kids' bedroom ke liye West (learning, creativity) ya North-West (movement, social skills) directions achhi mani jaati hain. North-East se avoid karein, kyunki yeh spiritual direction hai.

questions.question: Vastu ke anusaar, ghar mein 'Septic Tank' ki ideal location kya hai?

options.B: South-West
options.C: North-West ya South-East ke borders par

questions.explanation: Septic tank ke liye North-West ya South-East ke borders par, ghar ki boundary se thoda dur, ideal location mani jaati hai. Ise North-East, Brahmastan, ya ghar ke center se door rakhna chahiye.

questions.question: Ghar mein Mandir ya Pooja Ghar kis floor par hona chahiye?

options.B: Top floor par
options.C: Kisi bhi floor par, par North-East mein

questions.explanation: Pooja ghar kisi bhi floor par ho sakta hai, par uski location hamesha North-East direction mein honi chahiye. Basement mein mandir avoid karna chahiye.

questions.question: Dining area ke liye Vastu mein kaun si direction suitable hai?

options.B: North-West ya West

questions.explanation: Dining area ke liye North-West ya West direction suitable hai. Khana khate samay face East ya North ki taraf rakhna shubh mana jata hai, jo digestion aur health ke liye achha hai.

questions.question: Vastu ke anusaar, ghar mein over-head water tank ki ideal location kya hai?

options.B: South-West ya West

questions.explanation: Over-head water tank ke liye South-West ya West direction ideal hai, kyunki yeh directions heavy structures ko support karti hain. Ise North-East ya Brahmastan mein avoid karna chahiye.

questions.question: Ghar mein electrical gadgets aur switchboards kis direction mein hone chahiye?

options.B: South-East

questions.explanation: Electrical gadgets aur switchboards ke liye South-East (Agnikon) direction sabse suitable hai, kyunki yeh Agni (Fire) element se associated hai.

questions.question: Vastu Dosh Nivaran mein sabse pehla step kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Dosh ko identify karna aur uski severity samajhna

questions.explanation: Vastu Dosh Nivaran mein sabse pehla step hai dosh ko sahi tarike se identify karna, uski direction aur uske prabhav ko samajhna, taaki sahi remedy suggest ki ja sake.

questions.question: Agar ghar ka North-East corner cut ho, toh kya remedy suggest kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: North-East mein Vastu pyramid ya mirror lagayein

questions.explanation: North-East cut dosh ko kam karne ke liye, us corner mein Vastu pyramid, mirror, ya Lord Shiva ka photo lagana ek effective remedy hai. Green plants bhi help kar sakte hain.

questions.question: South-West entrance ke dosh ko kam karne ke liye kya kiya ja sakta hai?

options.A: Entrance ko dark colors se paint karein
options.B: Entrance par Om, Swastik ya Trishul lagayein, aur 3 Vastu pyramids place karein
options.C: Entrance ke samne water fountain rakhein

questions.explanation: South-West entrance dosh ko neutralize karne ke liye, entrance par Om, Swastik, ya Trishul symbols lagana, aur 3 Vastu pyramids ya Copper Vastu Strips place karna effective remedies hain.

questions.question: Brahmastan mein toilet hone par kya remedy suggest kiya jata hai?

options.A: Toilet ko use karna band kar dein
options.B: Toilet ki walls ko yellow paint karein aur door ko hamesha band rakhein

questions.explanation: Brahmastan mein toilet ek bada dosh hai. Ise shift karna best hai, par agar possible na ho toh toilet ki walls ko yellow paint karna, door ko hamesha band rakhna, aur toilet pot par salt bowl rakhna remedies ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Vastu dosh nivaran mein colors ka kya role hai?

options.B: Energy ko balance aur harmonize karne ke liye
options.C: Room ke size ko bada dikhane ke liye
options.D: Sirf mood change karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Colors Vastu dosh nivaran mein bahut important role play karte hain. Har direction aur element ka apna specific color hota hai, jiske through energy ko balance aur harmonize kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Agar kitchen North-East mein ho, toh kya remedy suggest kiya jata hai?

options.A: Kitchen ko South-East mein shift kar dein
options.B: Kitchen mein yellow color ka paint karein aur Agni yantra rakhein
options.D: Kitchen ko use karna band kar dein

questions.explanation: North-East kitchen ek bada dosh hai. Agar shift karna possible na ho toh kitchen mein yellow color ka zyada use karein, Agni yantra ya Vastu pyramid rakhein, aur cooking karte samay face East ki taraf rakhein.

questions.question: Vastu mein mirrors ka dosh nivaran mein kya upyog hai?

options.B: Energy ko multiply karne ya negative energy ko divert karne ke liye
options.C: Room ko bada dikhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Mirrors ka upyog Vastu mein energy ko multiply karne (jaise North ya East mein wealth attract karne ke liye) ya negative energy ko divert karne ke liye (jaise galat entrance ke samne) kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Agar ghar mein staircase North-East mein ho, toh kya remedy suggest kiya ja sakta hai?

options.A: Staircase ko West mein shift kar dein
options.B: Staircase ke neeche water fountain rakhein
options.C: Staircase ke har step par Vastu yantra rakhein

questions.explanation: North-East staircase ek bada dosh hai. Ise shift karna best hai. Agar possible na ho toh staircase ke har step par Vastu yantra ya specific crystals rakhna, aur lighting ko adjust karna remedies ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Vastu mein plants ka dosh nivaran mein kya mahatva hai?

options.B: Positive energy ko enhance karna aur negative energy ko absorb karna

questions.explanation: Plants Vastu mein bahut mahatvapurna hain. Yeh positive energy ko enhance karte hain, negative energy ko absorb karte hain, aur environment ko purify karte hain. Tulsi, Money plant, Snake plant shubh hain.

questions.question: Agar ghar mein Vastu dosh ho aur koi remedy possible na ho, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Regularly Vastu puja aur chanting karna chahiye
options.D: Negative effects ko accept kar lena chahiye

questions.explanation: Agar koi physical remedy possible na ho, toh regular Vastu puja, mantras ka jaap, aur positive affirmations ka upyog karke dosh ke negative prabhav ko kam kiya ja sakta hai. Energy cleansing bhi help karti hai.

questions.question: Vastu yantras ka dosh nivaran mein kya role hai?

options.B: Yeh specific directions ki energy ko balance aur rectify karte hain
options.C: Yeh sirf money attract karte hain
options.D: Yeh furniture ke neeche rakhe jaate hain

questions.explanation: Vastu yantras specific directions aur elements ki energy ko balance aur rectify karne ke liye use kiye jaate hain. Har yantra ka apna ek unique vibration aur purpose hota hai.

questions.question: Vastu dosh nivaran mein 'Pyramids' ka kya upyog hai?

options.A: Yeh sirf decoration ke liye hain
options.B: Yeh energy ko amplify aur redirect karte hain
options.C: Yeh sirf ancient structures mein use hote hain
options.D: Yeh negative energy ko attract karte hain

questions.explanation: Vastu pyramids energy ko amplify, balance, aur redirect karne ke liye bahut effective hote hain. Inhe dosh wale areas mein place karke negative energy ko neutralize kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Agar bedroom mein bed ke samne mirror ho, toh kya remedy hai?

options.A: Mirror ko cover kar dein ya uski position change kar dein
options.B: Mirror ko clean karte rahein

questions.explanation: Bed ke samne mirror hone se sleep disturbance aur relationship issues ho sakte hain. Ise cover kar dena chahiye ya uski position change kar deni chahiye taaki sote waqt reflection na dikhe.

questions.question: Vastu dosh nivaran mein 'Salt' ka kya upyog hai?

options.A: Yeh sirf khane mein use hota hai
options.B: Negative energy ko absorb aur neutralize karta hai
options.C: Yeh ghar ko decorate karta hai
options.D: Yeh positive energy ko attract karta hai

questions.explanation: Salt, especially rock salt, negative energy ko absorb aur neutralize karne ke liye use hota hai. Ise corners mein ya toilet mein rakhna ek common remedy hai.

questions.question: Agar ghar mein beams exposed hon, toh kya Vastu dosh hota hai?

options.B: Haan, yeh mental stress aur health issues create kar sakta hai
options.D: Sirf bade gharon mein problem hai

questions.explanation: Exposed beams, especially bed ya working desk ke upar, mental stress, headache, aur health issues create kar sakte hain. Inhe false ceiling se cover karna ya unke neeche baithne/sone se bachna chahiye.

questions.question: Vastu mein 'Sound Therapy' ka kya role hai?

options.A: Yeh sirf music sunne ke liye hai
options.B: Yeh specific frequencies aur vibrations se energy ko purify aur balance karta hai
options.C: Yeh noise pollution create karta hai
options.D: Yeh sirf meditation ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Sound therapy (jaise chanting, bells, wind chimes, Vastu music) specific frequencies aur vibrations se energy ko purify aur balance karta hai, aur negative energy ko disperse karta hai.

questions.question: Ek Vastu consultant ko client se initial consultation mein kya details poochhni chahiye?

options.B: Property ka address, floor plan, aur unki mukhya concerns
options.C: Sirf unke family members ke names

questions.explanation: Initial consultation mein Vastu consultant ko property ka address, detailed floor plan, aur client ki mukhya concerns (jaise health, wealth, relationships) poochhni chahiye taaki accurate analysis ho sake.

questions.question: Site visit ke dauran Vastu consultant ko kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Directions using compass, plot ka slope, surrounding environment, aur internal layout

questions.explanation: Site visit mein Vastu consultant ko compass se directions check karna, plot ka slope, aas-paas ka environment (jaise water bodies, roads, factories), aur ghar ka internal layout aur har room ki placement check karni chahiye.

questions.question: Vastu plan draw karte samay sabse pehle kya mark karna chahiye?

options.B: True North direction

questions.explanation: Vastu plan draw karte samay sabse pehle true North direction ko mark karna chahiye, kyunki iske bina sabhi directions aur Vastu zones ki accurate placement impossible hai.

questions.question: Existing structure mein Vastu dosh ko address karte samay, kis cheez ko priority deni chahiye?

options.A: Sabse chote dosh ko pehle theek karein
options.B: Sabse bade aur prabhavshali dosh ko pehle theek karein
options.C: Sirf un dosh ko theek karein jinme kam paisa lage
options.D: Client ki pasand ke dosh ko theek karein

questions.explanation: Existing structure mein Vastu dosh ko address karte samay, sabse bade aur prabhavshali dosh ko pehle theek karna chahiye, kyunki unka impact sabse zyada hota hai. Jaise North-East cut ya South-West entrance.

questions.question: Vastu remedies suggest karte samay, ek consultant ko kya ethical consideration rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Client ki financial situation aur practical limitations ko consider karein
options.C: Apne personal beliefs ko enforce karein
options.D: Client ko darayein ki agar remedy nahi ki toh bura hoga

questions.explanation: Ek ethical Vastu consultant ko client ki financial situation aur practical limitations ko hamesha consider karna chahiye. Aise remedies suggest karein jo affordable aur feasible hon, na ki unhe darayein ya unpar unnecessary burden daalein.

questions.question: Vastu dosh nivaran mein 'Demolition' kab suggest kiya jata hai?

options.A: Hamesha pehle option ke roop mein
options.B: Jab koi aur remedy effective na ho aur dosh bahut gambhir ho
options.C: Jab client ko naya ghar chahiye ho

questions.explanation: Demolition tabhi suggest kiya jata hai jab Vastu dosh bahut gambhir ho aur uska koi non-structural remedy effective na ho. Yeh last resort hona chahiye, kyunki yeh costly aur time-consuming hota hai.

questions.question: Vastu consultant ko client ko feedback aur follow-up ke liye kya advise karna chahiye?

options.A: Remedies lagane ke baad kabhi contact na karein
options.B: Ek specific time period ke baad changes observe karein aur feedback dein
options.D: Har din call karke report dein

questions.explanation: Vastu remedies lagane ke baad, client ko ek specific time period (jaise 3-6 mahine) ke baad ghar mein changes ko observe karne aur feedback dene ke liye advise karna chahiye. Follow-up consultations bhi beneficial ho sakti hain.

questions.question: Agar client ka plot irregular shape ka ho, toh kya advise karna chahiye?

options.B: Boundary walls ya landscaping se plot ko regular shape dein

questions.explanation: Irregular shape ke plot ko boundary walls, landscaping, ya plants ka use karke ek regular (square ya rectangular) shape dene ki koshish karni chahiye. Isse dosh ka prabhav kam hota hai.

questions.question: Vastu consultant ko apni fees kaise set karni chahiye?

options.A: Randomly koi bhi amount charge karein
options.B: Apne experience, services ki range, aur market rates ke hisab se transparently set karein
options.C: Sirf client ki wealth dekh kar

questions.explanation: Ek professional Vastu consultant ko apni fees apne experience, provide ki jaane wali services ki range, aur market rates ke hisab se transparently set karni chahiye. Isse trust build hota hai.

questions.question: Vastu analysis karte samay, surrounding environment ka kya mahatva hai?

options.B: Bahut important, kyunki yeh ghar ki energy ko affect karta hai
options.D: Sirf noise level ke liye important

questions.explanation: Ghar ke aas-paas ka environment (jaise hospital, graveyard, factory, high-tension wires, water bodies) ghar ki energy ko significantly affect karta hai. Iska analysis Vastu mein bahut important hai.

questions.question: Vastu mein 'Mahurat' ka kya role hai naye ghar mein pravesh karte samay?

options.B: Yeh ek shubh samay hai positive energy ke saath naya chapter shuru karne ke liye
options.C: Sirf pandit ki fees badhane ke liye hai
options.D: Sirf naye saal par hota hai

questions.explanation: Naye ghar mein pravesh karte samay 'Mahurat' (auspicious time) ka chayan karna bahut shubh mana jata hai. Yeh positive energy aur good luck ke saath naya chapter shuru karne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Agar client ke paas detailed floor plan na ho, toh Vastu consultant ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Client ko manually sketch banane ko kahein ya khud site par sketch karein
options.C: Sirf verbal description par rely karein

questions.explanation: Agar detailed floor plan available na ho, toh Vastu consultant client ko manually sketch banane ko keh sakta hai ya site visit ke dauran khud measurements lekar sketch bana sakta hai. Accurate plan analysis ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Vastu remedies ki effectiveness kitne time mein dikhti hai?

options.B: Kuch dino mein
options.C: Generally 3-6 mahine lagte hain, par individual par depend karta hai

questions.explanation: Vastu remedies ki effectiveness dikhne mein generally 3 se 6 mahine lag sakte hain, kyunki energy patterns ko change hone mein time lagta hai. Yeh client ki faith aur dosh ki severity par bhi depend karta hai.

questions.question: Vastu mein 'Energy Audit' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Ghar mein positive aur negative energy zones ko identify karna
options.C: Ghar ki financial status check karna

questions.explanation: Vastu mein Energy Audit ka matlab hai ghar mein positive aur negative energy zones ko identify karna, unke sources ko samajhna, aur unhe balance karne ke liye strategies develop karna. Isme dasha aur padas ki bhi study hoti hai.

questions.question: Vastu consultant ko kis tarah ki language use karni chahiye client ke saath?

options.B: Simple, clear, aur respectful language

questions.explanation: Vastu consultant ko client ke saath simple, clear, aur respectful language use karni chahiye, taaki client Vastu principles aur remedies ko aasani se samajh sake. Hinglish bhi ek effective communication medium ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Vastu consultation ke baad, client ko kya recommendation dena chahiye regarding maintenance?

options.B: Ghar ko clean aur clutter-free rakhein, aur remedies ko regularly check karein

questions.explanation: Vastu consultation ke baad, client ko ghar ko clean, clutter-free, aur well-maintained rakhne ki recommendation deni chahiye. Remedies ko regularly check karna aur unki effectiveness ko monitor karna bhi zaroori hai.
